name: Cash America Pawn
description_short: Garfield Heights, OH's Cash America Pawn at 12700 Rockside Rd offers quick cash loans and sales on jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles with convenient weekday and Saturday hours.
description_long:
Cash America Pawn's Garfield Heights location sits at 12700 Rockside Rd, a standalone shop serving residents of this southeast Cleveland suburb. The store operates Monday through Friday from 10 AM to 6 PM, with Saturday hours from 10 AM to 5 PM, and is closed Sundays. This accessible location makes it convenient for quick visits whether you need fast cash or want to browse pre-owned merchandise.

This Garfield Heights, OH pawn shop provides quick cash loans on items like jewelry, electronics, tools, and collectibles, as well as outright sales. Whether you're looking to pawn an item for a short-term loan, sell something for cash, or find deals on quality pre-owned goods, the knowledgeable staff can help determine what your items are worth. Call 216-581-4650 to speak with the team about your items or to ask questions before you visit.

If you're a Garfield Heights resident facing unexpected expenses, Cash America Pawn offers a fast alternative to traditional banks or credit cards. Bring your ID and the items you want to pawn or sell, and you can walk out with cash the same day. No credit check required—pawn loans are based on item value, not your credit history.
pros: 3,300+ locations across 29 U.S. states, D.C., U.K., and Latin America provides convenient access
Instant cash funding with no credit check or income verification required
Non-recourse loans mean no personal liability beyond loss of collateral
Accepts wide variety of items (jewelry, electronics, tools, appliances, instruments, sporting goods)
Layaway service available with affordable 10% down payment option
Gold and precious metal buying service for customers with immediate cash needs
Large established company with 22,000+ employees and S&P MidCap 400 listing provides stability
cons: Implicit cost structure: customers lose use of valuable items and typically repurchase at higher prices than loan amount
Non-recourse loans mean collateral forfeiture after default—no debt obligation but loss of property
Retail inventory from pawned items means merchandise quality and selection vary by location and time
Physical surrender of items creates inconvenience and emotional cost of losing personal property
Loan terms and interest rates not disclosed on website—require visiting store location to determine actual cost
best_for: Consumers needing immediate cash who own valuable items and lack access to traditional credit
Individuals in urgent financial situations (medical bills, unexpected expenses) who need same-day funding
People with poor or no credit history who cannot qualify for personal loans or credit cards
Customers seeking to buy discounted merchandise from pawn inventory
diagnosis: FirstCash is best for unbanked or credit-constrained consumers facing immediate cash emergencies who own valuable collateral and lack access to traditional lending. The main caveat is that pawn loans create opportunity cost through loss of item use, implicit markup when repurchasing items, and ultimate loss of collateral if unable to repay—making this suitable only for true emergency situations rather than routine borrowing.
services: Pawn loans secured by personal property
Retail sales of jewelry, electronics, tools, and merchandise
Gold and precious metal buying for cash
Lease-to-own financing through subsidiary AFF network
Retail finance payment solutions at 15,000+ merchant partner locations
Store locator service for finding nearest location
meta_description: Cash America Pawn at 12700 Rockside Rd, Garfield Heights, OH. Quick cash loans and sales on jewelry, electronics, and more.
